scenario.name: Late NOTIFY
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];rport;branch=z9hG4bK-s1632-001174722495-1--s1632- From: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]>;tag=5 To:[field1] <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;transport=tcp>;expires=300 Max-Forwards: 70 CSeq: 11 NOTIFY Subscription-State: active;expires=2000 Server: Avaya Aura Presence Services 7.1.2.0-SNAPSHOT-230 Event: avaya-cm-feature-status Content-Length: [len]

 <feature name="service-observing" status="on"/>
